title: Make Gravatar profile render before User model deploy
description: Decouple profile display (email/displayName/gravatar) from User model persistence so sidebar/settings still show identity when User schema changes are not yet deployed. Keep User sync best-effort. Also ensure Manage Gravatar control uses standard Button component styling.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented Gravatar/profile UX fix in dashboard code: (1) user profile rendering now remains available from Cognito even if User model sync fails (best-effort sync, warning-only), so sidebar/settings no longer collapse to 'User'/'No email available' during staged schema rollout; (2) Manage Gravatar control on /lab/settings now uses standard Button component with explicit click handler to open https://gravatar.com/profile/avatars. Validation: dashboard targeted Jest suites passed (settings + dashboard layout) and dashboard typecheck passed.
